title: Off-by-One in Range
description: This function should sum numbers 1 through n inclusive, but returns the wrong result. Identify the line with the bug.
codeTemplate:
def sum_range(n):
    total = 0
    for i in range(n):   # BUG IS HERE
        total += i
    return total
hints: range(n) starts at 0 and excludes n.

title: Null Check Missing
description: This method throws a NullPointerException on empty input. Identify and fix the missing guard.
hints: Always guard against null and empty arrays before indexing.

title: Iterator Invalidation
description: This loop erases elements while iterating — a classic undefined behaviour. Identify the fix.
hints: erase() returns a valid iterator to the next element — use it.
